markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Ryan Gusto records 8+ strikeouts in the Miami vs Colorado professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 2, 2026 at 3:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Ryan Gusto is scratched or is not a starting pitcher, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Ryan Gusto is not a starting pitcher but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, relief appearances will not count towards this market.
If Ryan Gusto is a starting pitcher and records at least one pitch the market will settle based on strikeouts recorded.
markets.title: Ryan Gusto: 8+ strikeouts?
